# Tap.Giving

> Simple, affordable NFC tap-to-give plates for churches. No monthly fees, no setup fees, no platform lock-in. Works with any giving platform.

Tap.Giving provides NFC (Near Field Communication) tap plates that churches embed in their offering plates or pew backs. When a congregant taps their smartphone on the plate, it instantly opens the church's existing giving page — no app download, no account creation. Plates are a one-time purchase starting at $3.50 each with free shipping.

## Key Facts

- One-time cost: $3.50–$4.50 per plate (volume discounts available)
- Zero monthly fees, zero setup fees
- Works with any giving platform: Tithely, Pushpay, Subsplash, Planning Center, Donorbox, and more
- No app required — works with any NFC-enabled smartphone
- NFC chips are passive (no batteries), maintenance-free, and durable
- Plates arrive pre-programmed with the church's giving link
- Churches can update the linked URL at any time

## Pages

- [Home](https://tap.giving/): Main landing page with product overview, stats, and order form
- [About](https://tap.giving/about.html): Founded by a pastor — our story and mission
- [Pricing](https://tap.giving/pricing.html): Transparent volume pricing tiers and cost comparison
- [How It Works](https://tap.giving/how-it-works.html): 3-step process — Tap, Give, Done
- [Order](https://tap.giving/order.html): Order form for NFC tap plates
- [Blog](https://tap.giving/blog.html): Articles on church giving technology, platform comparisons, and strategy
- [NFC FAQ](https://tap.giving/nfc-faq.html): Technical FAQ on locked vs unlocked NFC plates and security
- [Contact](https://tap.giving/contact.html): Contact form and support information
- [Pushpay + Tap.Giving](https://tap.giving/pushpay.html): Landing page for Pushpay users
- [Tithe.ly + Tap.Giving](https://tap.giving/tithely.html): Landing page for Tithe.ly users
